login.title: Verify OTP code
login.description: Use the authenticator app configured on your device to log in using the OTP code

change-password.title: Change password
change-password.description: For security reasons, it is necessary to change your password after the first login.

setup.label: Generating QR code...
setup.title: Set up Two-Factor Authentication
setup.description: Scan this QR code with your authentication app
setup.helper-description: Configure the authenticator with the manual code
setup.description-help: To protect your account and ensure maximum security of your data, you must configure two-factor authentication (2FA).
setup.description-help-2: To proceed, you will need an authentication app like Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or you can use Apple Passwords (on Apple devices).
setup.description-help-3: Once configured, you will need to enter a 6-digit code generated by the app every time you log in, adding an extra layer of protection to your account.

verify.title: Verify device OTP code
verify.description: Use the configured authenticator app to verify OTP access via your device.

email.title: Recover Password
email.description: Enter your email address to receive the verification code

verify.title: Verify Code
verify.description: We sent a verification code to {{email}}

change.title: New Password
change.privacy-consent-label-1: Pursuant to and for the purposes of Articles 13 and 6 of EU Regulation 2016/679, I declare that I have read the
change.privacy-consent-link: privacy policy for the processing of personal data
change.privacy-consent-required: You must accept the privacy policy to proceed
change.responsibility-consent-label-1: I declare that I have read the
change.responsibility-consent-label-2: pursuant to and for the purposes of Article 28 of EU Regulation 2016/679 and appoint One Company S.r.l. as External Data Processor.
change.responsibility-consent-required: You must accept the policy to proceed

success.title: Password Updated!
success.description: Your password has been successfully changed. You can now log in with the new password.
